match.userMessage:
Cinematic locked beauty close-up in the style of modern social-first product photography, SCARLETT wearing light casual beachwear suitable for water and promenade swipes coral lipstick across her lower lip in mid-application with one hand raised blotting once, crisp white vanity space with open windows allowing natural sunlight and minimal modern architecture in soft focus behind, bright natural window light casting clean directional shadows and warm skin tones across the frame, high-key airy atmosphere with true-to-life color and shallow depth of field emphasizing the tactile moment, eye-level macro lens with sharp focus on the lips and soft bokeh on the background.

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - Crisp white vanity space with open windows allowing natural sunlight
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
